'''Skahrolta''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] who was a member of [[Sebolto]]'s clan during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was wanted by the [[Pixelito Grand Council]] for being a peddler of [[Death stick/Legends|death sticks]] to the [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] youth. His [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] was claimed by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]]-turned [[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
